_comment: Bulk seed covering the task 6 AI/tech ecosystem. Entities are upserted with static financial metadata; events are pairwise news items targeting ≥5 per entity after merging with the Glasswing seed. URLs are real where cited from published reporting; the few illustrative/analyst items are marked with a `sheaf://` scheme so dedup still works.

events.title: Microsoft deepens OpenAI investment with $10B multi-year deal
events.description: Microsoft extends its partnership with OpenAI with a reported $10B multi-year investment, cementing Azure as OpenAI's exclusive cloud provider.

events.title: Apple integrates ChatGPT into Siri via Apple Intelligence
events.description: At WWDC24, Apple unveils Apple Intelligence and announces a ChatGPT integration inside Siri and system writing tools, with OpenAI as the first external model partner.

events.title: OpenAI's GPT-4 training reportedly used 25,000 Nvidia A100 GPUs
events.description: Reuters reports that GPT-4 training ran across roughly 25,000 Nvidia A100 GPUs, underscoring OpenAI's reliance on Nvidia's Hopper and Ampere silicon.

events.title: FTC opens investigation into OpenAI over consumer harm
events.description: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission opens an investigation into OpenAI over whether ChatGPT harmed consumers with false outputs and data handling practices.

events.title: Meta open-sources Llama 3 in direct challenge to GPT-4
events.description: Meta releases Llama 3 as an open-weights model aimed directly at GPT-4-class performance, reframing the frontier competition around OpenAI.

events.title: EU fines Apple €1.8B over App Store music streaming rules
events.description: The European Commission fines Apple €1.8B for abusing its dominant position in the distribution of music streaming apps through the App Store.

events.title: DOJ sues Apple alleging iPhone smartphone monopoly
events.description: The U.S. Department of Justice, joined by 15 states, sues Apple alleging an illegal monopoly over the smartphone market and anti-steering App Store rules.

events.title: Apple becomes first customer for TSMC 2nm process
events.description: Reports indicate Apple has booked TSMC's upcoming 2nm node for the A20 iPhone chip in 2026, securing initial capacity ahead of AMD and Nvidia.

events.title: Apple Intelligence to use Google Gemini as secondary model
events.description: Bloomberg reports Apple is in talks to license Google's Gemini models as a secondary LLM provider for Apple Intelligence alongside OpenAI.

events.title: EU opens formal DMA probe against Meta over pay-or-consent ads
events.description: The European Commission opens a Digital Markets Act non-compliance investigation against Meta over its 'pay or consent' advertising model on Facebook and Instagram.

events.title: Meta to operate 350K Nvidia H100 GPUs for AI training
events.description: Mark Zuckerberg confirms Meta will have 350,000 Nvidia H100 GPUs by end of 2024, spending an estimated $9B on AI infrastructure.

events.title: Meta shares jump as TikTok ban bill advances in Congress
events.description: Meta stock surges as the House passes legislation that could force ByteDance to divest TikTok, with analysts calling Instagram Reels the primary beneficiary.

events.title: Amazon completes $4B investment in Anthropic
events.description: Amazon completes a $4 billion investment in Anthropic, making AWS its primary cloud provider and Trainium/Inferentia its primary training chip partner.

events.title: AWS expands Nvidia H200 capacity for Bedrock customers
events.description: AWS and Nvidia announce expanded collaboration bringing Blackwell B200 and H200 GPUs to EC2 and Bedrock customers across generative AI workloads.

events.title: FTC antitrust case against Amazon advances to discovery phase
events.description: The FTC and 17 state attorneys general sue Amazon, alleging the retailer uses anti-discounting measures and Prime seller requirements to maintain monopoly power.

events.title: TSMC ramps Blackwell CoWoS packaging for Nvidia
events.description: TSMC doubles its CoWoS advanced packaging capacity through 2025 to meet surging Nvidia demand for the Blackwell B100 and B200 GPUs.

events.title: AMD MI300X posts competitive benchmarks against Nvidia H100
events.description: AMD unveils the MI300X GPU with 192GB HBM3, posting MLPerf results that trade punches with Nvidia H100 in inference workloads.

events.title: Nvidia dethrones Intel in S&P 500 market cap ranking
events.description: Nvidia's market capitalization surpasses Intel's by more than 10x as the AI boom re-orders the semiconductor industry leaderboard.

events.title: Intel Foundry wins Microsoft 18A customer commitment
events.description: Intel Foundry announces Microsoft will use Intel 18A for custom chip designs as Intel challenges TSMC in leading-edge contract manufacturing.

events.title: Intel and AMD form x86 ecosystem advisory group
events.description: Intel and AMD jointly announce an x86 ecosystem advisory group, a rare cross-rival collaboration aimed at reinforcing x86 against Arm's data-center inroads.

events.title: Microsoft to buy Intel 18A silicon for custom data center chip
events.description: Microsoft commits to fabricating a custom data center processor at Intel Foundry on the 18A process, its largest non-TSMC wafer commitment to date.

events.title: Microsoft Azure expands Instinct MI300X deployment
events.description: Microsoft becomes the first hyperscaler to deploy AMD Instinct MI300X in Azure, offering an alternative to Nvidia-dominated AI training fleets.

events.title: Meta commits to buy AMD MI300X for 2024 inference workloads
events.description: Meta signals it will purchase AMD's MI300X GPUs for its recommendation and inference workloads, diversifying away from exclusive Nvidia reliance.

events.title: Oracle joins Microsoft + OpenAI Stargate data center project
events.description: Oracle is named a key infrastructure partner in the $100B Stargate AI data center effort led by Microsoft and OpenAI.

events.title: Oracle Cloud commits to 20K Nvidia Blackwell GPUs
events.description: Oracle and Nvidia expand their AI collaboration with Oracle committing to 20,000 Blackwell B200 GPUs for OCI generative AI offerings.

events.title: Oracle and Google Cloud launch Oracle Database@Google Cloud
events.description: Oracle and Google Cloud launch Oracle Database@Google Cloud, a multicloud offering bringing Exadata directly into Google's data centers.

events.title: Oracle Database@Azure expands to ten regions
events.description: Oracle Database@Azure expands to ten global regions, cementing Oracle's multicloud pivot after decades of hostility toward public cloud rivals.

events.title: Oracle and AWS announce Database@AWS partnership
events.description: Oracle and AWS unveil Oracle Database@AWS, completing Oracle's hyperscaler multicloud trifecta alongside Azure and Google Cloud deals.

events.title: IBM Granite 3.0 models released under Apache 2.0 on Hugging Face
events.description: IBM releases the Granite 3.0 family of language models under an Apache 2.0 license, leaning on its Linux Foundation / Red Hat open-source playbook for enterprise adoption.

events.title: IBM watsonx adds Nvidia NIM microservices for enterprise GenAI
events.description: IBM integrates Nvidia NIM inference microservices into watsonx, giving enterprise customers a one-click path to GPU-accelerated model deployment.

events.title: IBM consulting picks Oracle Fusion apps for new $1B practice
events.description: IBM Consulting launches a dedicated Oracle Fusion practice with a $1B investment, signaling its aggressive SI push across ERP and HCM modernization.

events.title: IBM watsonx Assistants land on Salesforce Einstein 1 Studio
events.description: IBM and Salesforce expand their partnership to embed watsonx assistants inside Einstein 1 Studio, targeting CRM workflows with open-model options.

events.title: Adobe abandons $20B Figma acquisition amid regulator pressure
events.description: Adobe and Figma mutually terminate their $20B acquisition agreement, citing no clear path to regulatory approval from the EU and UK.

events.title: EC issues statement of objections to Adobe-Figma deal
events.description: The European Commission issues a statement of objections to Adobe's proposed $20B Figma acquisition, citing risks to design software competition.

events.title: Figma launches AI design features powered by GPT-4o
events.description: At Config 2024 Figma unveils Figma AI, a suite of generative design features built on GPT-4o, then pulls one of the tools after complaints it cloned iOS app layouts.

events.title: Adobe Firefly adds third-party models including OpenAI Sora
events.description: Adobe Premiere's Generative Extend adds support for third-party video models including OpenAI's Sora, positioning Firefly as a model-agnostic creative hub.

events.title: Adobe and Salesforce announce Experience Cloud integration
events.description: Adobe and Salesforce announce deepened integration between Adobe Experience Cloud and Salesforce Data Cloud, unifying marketing data across the two stacks.

events.title: Salesforce weaves Einstein Copilot into Slack across all plans
events.description: Salesforce brings Einstein Copilot natively into Slack on all paid plans, offering channel summaries, agent handoffs, and thread recaps.

events.title: Salesforce Agentforce adds Claude as default reasoning model
events.description: Salesforce makes Anthropic's Claude the default reasoning model in Agentforce, citing stronger compliance and tool use benchmarks.

events.title: Salesforce Data Cloud integrates with Google BigQuery
events.description: Salesforce and Google Cloud extend their partnership with zero-copy Data Cloud integration into BigQuery, expanding the Zero Copy Partner Network.

events.title: Slack AI rolls out Claude-powered channel summarization
events.description: Slack AI becomes generally available with Anthropic's Claude powering conversation summarization and search answers across Enterprise Grid workspaces.

events.title: Slack faces backlash over training models on customer data
events.description: Slack faces a customer backlash after it emerges the default privacy policy allows limited use of customer message data for machine learning model training.

events.title: Uber partners with Waymo for Austin and Atlanta robotaxi service
events.description: Uber and Alphabet's Waymo announce an exclusive robotaxi partnership in Austin and Atlanta, with Waymo vehicles dispatched through the Uber app.

events.title: Uber taps Nvidia Cosmos simulation for AV fleet training
events.description: Uber partners with Nvidia to use the Cosmos world-model simulator for autonomous vehicle training data generation across its third-party AV partners.

events.title: Uber deploys ChatGPT-powered customer support agents
events.description: Uber's customer service org deploys ChatGPT-powered agents for tier-1 support, reporting a 27% reduction in handle time in early pilots.

events.title: Meta WhatsApp adds Uber ride booking for India and Brazil
events.description: Meta and Uber integrate Uber ride booking directly inside WhatsApp for India and Brazil, a major push for WhatsApp Business commerce.

events.title: Amazon Zoox expands Vegas robotaxi service ahead of Uber Waymo launch
events.description: Amazon-owned Zoox begins offering public robotaxi rides on the Las Vegas Strip, going head-to-head with Uber's Waymo integration on the same corridor.

events.title: DOJ files supporting brief in TikTok divest-or-ban appeal
events.description: The Department of Justice files a brief defending the TikTok divest-or-ban law before the D.C. Circuit, citing national security and data flow concerns.

events.title: ByteDance ordered to divest TikTok under new U.S. law
events.description: President Biden signs legislation requiring ByteDance to divest TikTok within nine months or face a U.S. app-store ban, triggering immediate legal challenges.

events.title: Oracle expands Project Texas hosting for TikTok U.S. data
events.description: Oracle expands its Project Texas infrastructure to host additional TikTok U.S. user data, hoping to keep Washington from pulling the plug on ByteDance.

events.title: FTC refers TikTok investigation to DOJ over children's privacy
events.description: The FTC refers its long-running TikTok COPPA investigation to the Department of Justice, alleging children's privacy violations on the platform.

events.title: TikTok outspends Meta on U.S. lobbying for first time
events.description: TikTok's Q2 2024 U.S. lobbying spend surpasses Meta's for the first time as ByteDance scrambles to influence divest-or-ban enforcement rules.

events.title: OpenSSF launches Alpha-Omega Siren threat-sharing initiative
events.description: OpenSSF launches Siren, a real-time threat intelligence sharing initiative for open source maintainers funded by Alpha-Omega and the Linux Foundation.

events.title: Google commits additional $2M to OpenSSF Alpha-Omega
events.description: Google's security team commits an additional $2M to the OpenSSF Alpha-Omega project, deepening its support for critical open source hardening.

events.title: Microsoft and OpenSSF release SBOM everywhere blueprint
events.description: OpenSSF and Microsoft publish a joint 'SBOM Everywhere' blueprint for scaling software bill of materials generation across open source supply chains.

events.title: IBM joins OpenSSF Securing Software Repositories working group
events.description: IBM joins the OpenSSF Securing Software Repositories working group, contributing Sigstore expertise and enterprise signing infrastructure.

events.title: OpenSSF welcomes AWS as premier member
events.description: The OpenSSF welcomes Amazon Web Services as a premier member, expanding its roster of hyperscaler funders for open source security tooling.

events.title: Linux Foundation launches Unified Acceleration Foundation with Intel
events.description: The Linux Foundation announces the Unified Acceleration (UXL) Foundation, an open standard alternative to Nvidia CUDA with backing from Intel, Arm, Qualcomm and Samsung.

events.title: Nvidia joins Linux Foundation AI & Data as premier member
events.description: Nvidia upgrades to a Linux Foundation AI & Data premier member, committing engineering resources to Kubeflow, ONNX, and PyTorch Foundation projects.

events.title: Meta transfers PyTorch governance to Linux Foundation
events.description: Meta announces the PyTorch Foundation under the Linux Foundation, transferring governance of the deep learning framework to a neutral steward.

events.title: CrowdStrike Falcon update triggers global Windows outage
events.description: A faulty CrowdStrike Falcon sensor content update crashes an estimated 8.5M Windows systems worldwide, grounding airlines and disrupting hospitals.

events.title: JPMorgan extends CrowdStrike contract post-outage
events.description: JPMorgan Chase reaffirms its multi-year CrowdStrike contract two months after the July outage, calling the incident an isolated deployment failure.

events.title: Google Chronicle adds CrowdStrike Falcon telemetry integration
events.description: CrowdStrike and Google Cloud announce a bidirectional integration between Falcon and Chronicle SIEM for unified detection and response.

events.title: CrowdStrike Falcon Cloud Security adds AWS Graviton4 support
events.description: CrowdStrike adds AWS Graviton4 support across Falcon Cloud Security, enabling full runtime protection on Amazon's latest Arm-based instances.

events.title: JPMorgan launches internal LLM Suite powered by OpenAI GPT-4
events.description: JPMorgan Chase deploys its internal LLM Suite — a ChatGPT-like assistant powered by GPT-4 — to roughly 60,000 employees, one of the largest enterprise LLM rollouts to date.

events.title: JPMorgan scales Nvidia DGX SuperPOD for trading research
events.description: JPMorgan's quantitative research team scales up its Nvidia DGX SuperPOD deployment to accelerate large-scale generative AI backtesting pipelines.

events.title: JPMorgan names AWS as preferred cloud for retail banking
events.description: JPMorgan Chase names AWS as the preferred cloud for its retail banking platform, migrating core workloads off of on-prem data centers.

events.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet launches as default model on Amazon Bedrock
events.description: Anthropic launches Claude 3.5 Sonnet as a default model on Amazon Bedrock the same day as the main release, underscoring the Amazon-Anthropic alliance.

events.title: Oracle to host OpenAI model training on OCI supercluster
events.description: Oracle and OpenAI enter a strategic agreement for OCI to host model training workloads on new 32,768-GPU superclusters across multiple regions.

events.title: Alphabet boosts 2026 capex to $75B citing AI infrastructure
events.description: Alphabet CFO Ruth Porat announces a $75B capex plan for 2026 on the Q4 earnings call, citing data center and custom TPU investment for Gemini.

events.title: DOJ proposes Chrome divestiture as Google Search antitrust remedy
events.description: The Department of Justice files its proposed remedies in U.S. v. Google, recommending a forced Chrome divestiture and a ban on default-search payments.

events.title: FTC opens inquiry into Microsoft OpenAI investment structure
events.description: The FTC launches a 6(b) study of generative AI investments, subpoenaing Microsoft, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and Amazon for partnership details.

events.title: Palantir awarded $178M Army TITAN ground station contract
events.description: The U.S. Army awards Palantir a $178M contract to deliver the first 10 TITAN tactical intelligence ground stations for long-range precision fires targeting.

events.title: Palantir wins $480M Army Maven Smart System prototype
events.description: Palantir wins a $480M Other Transaction Agreement from the U.S. Army to productionize the Maven Smart System, the Pentagon's flagship AI battlefield intelligence tool.

events.title: Palantir integrates Nvidia NIM microservices into Foundry AIP
events.description: Palantir announces a deep integration of Nvidia NIM inference microservices into Foundry's Artificial Intelligence Platform, bringing accelerated LLM inference to AIP workflows.

events.title: Palantir Foundry available in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure marketplace
events.description: Palantir Foundry and AIP become available as first-party offerings in the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure marketplace, giving Palantir a fourth hyperscaler channel alongside AWS, Azure and Google Cloud.

events.title: EU accepts Amazon commitments to end self-preferencing probe
events.description: The European Commission accepts binding commitments from Amazon to end self-preferencing of its own products in search rankings and Buy Box placement.

events.title: Amazon Ads partners with Meta for Instagram in-app Prime checkout
events.description: Amazon Ads and Meta announce a partnership allowing shoppers to link their Amazon account to Facebook and Instagram for in-app Prime checkout.

events.title: Amazon sells Apple Vision Pro through prime for first time
events.description: Apple agrees to sell the Vision Pro headset directly through Amazon, ending years of Apple reluctance to distribute flagship hardware via the e-commerce giant.

events.title: Intel settles DOJ export-control case over China shipments
events.description: Intel agrees to a settlement with the Department of Justice over alleged export-control violations involving shipments of dual-use semiconductors to sanctioned Chinese entities.

events.title: Intel Gaudi 3 AI accelerator launches with Google Cloud preview
events.description: Intel launches the Gaudi 3 AI accelerator and announces a Google Cloud preview availability, positioning it as a lower-cost alternative to Nvidia H100 for training.

events.title: Google Cloud launches MI300X Instinct GPU VMs
events.description: Google Cloud makes AMD Instinct MI300X GPU VMs generally available, giving customers a second-source AI accelerator option alongside Nvidia H100/H200 instances.

events.title: Oracle OCI becomes first hyperscaler to offer MI355X general availability
events.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure becomes the first public cloud to offer general availability of AMD's next-gen MI355X GPUs for generative AI training workloads.

events.title: Figma adds GitHub Copilot plugin for design-to-code workflows
events.description: Figma launches an official GitHub Copilot plugin turning design frames into React components, tightening its bet on Microsoft as a developer-tooling partner.

events.title: Figma and Google Workspace integrate Slides with FigJam
events.description: Figma and Google Workspace roll out a FigJam integration inside Google Slides and Meet, letting Workspace users embed live collaborative boards in docs.

events.title: Adobe Firefly Video Model trained on Nvidia DGX Cloud
events.description: Adobe reveals its Firefly Video Model is trained on Nvidia DGX Cloud, crediting the Nvidia partnership with dramatically accelerating foundation model iteration.

events.title: Adobe Lightroom adds native Apple Vision Pro support
events.description: Adobe launches native Lightroom and Firefly apps for Apple Vision Pro on launch day, one of only a handful of flagship enterprise apps available at visionOS debut.

events.title: Slack integrates Google Gemini summarization alongside Claude
events.description: Slack adds Google Gemini as a second summarization backend alongside Anthropic's Claude, giving admins the ability to pick per-workspace which frontier model powers AI recap features.

events.title: Slack sues Microsoft in EU over Teams bundling
events.description: Slack files a formal EU antitrust complaint accusing Microsoft of illegally bundling Teams with Office 365, an ancient but still-cited precedent for the current Teams divestiture case.

events.title: CrowdStrike Falcon adds Nvidia Morpheus GPU threat analysis
events.description: CrowdStrike integrates Nvidia Morpheus GPU-accelerated AI pipelines into Falcon's LogScale threat analytics, targeting hyperscale SOC workloads.

events.title: JPMorgan expands LLM Suite to include Anthropic Claude
events.description: JPMorgan Chase expands its internal LLM Suite to add Anthropic's Claude alongside GPT-4, citing compliance advantages for regulated research workflows.

events.title: JPMorgan picks Microsoft Fabric for analyst productivity platform
events.description: JPMorgan's Corporate & Investment Bank selects Microsoft Fabric as the backbone of a new analyst productivity platform rolling out to 60,000 users in 2025.

events.title: JPMorgan rolls out Palantir Foundry for wholesale risk analytics
events.description: JPMorgan Chase expands its Palantir Foundry footprint into wholesale credit risk analytics, unifying counterparty exposure dashboards across the Corporate & Investment Bank.

events.title: IBM Consulting launches Palantir AIP delivery practice
events.description: IBM Consulting announces a dedicated Palantir AIP delivery practice to help enterprise clients operationalize generative AI on top of existing data estates.
